posts.title: Where Was the Berlin Wall? An Interactive Map of East and West in 1989
posts.summary: The Wall ran 155 km around West Berlin. Tap any point on this interactive map to see exactly where it stood.
posts.alt: An interactive map showing the route of the Berlin Wall around West Berlin in 1989
